ADA
FUEL GRADE IFO 380CST RMG380(ISO 8217-2010) LSMGO DMA(ISO8217-2010)
WARRANTED SPEED AND CONSUMPTION APPLIER IN GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS UP TO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT WIND FORCE MAX 4 (12-16 KONT)AND DOUGLAS SEA STATE MAX 3 (MAXIMUM WAVE HEIGHT OF 1.25M) FREE FROM ADVERSE EFFECTS OF CURRENTS AND/OR SWELL FAVOURABLE CURRENTS ARE NOT BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT,EVEN KEEL AT DESIGN DRAFT,AND EXCLUDING VOYAGES LESS THAN 48 HOURS TRANSIT TIME FROM SEA PILOT TO SEA PILOT,PASSAGE WITH RESTRICTED VISIBILITY,CONGESTED WATERS STRAITS,NARROWED WATERS,AND WHILE MANEUVERING,LEAVING AND ENTERING PORTS,ABOUT QUALIFIES BOTH SPEED AND CONSUMPTION MEANS UP TO 5% ADDITIONAL FUEL CONSUMPTION AND UP TO 0.5 KNOTS LOWER SPEED,SPEED UNDERPERFORMANCE TO BE OFFSET AGAINST UNDER-CONSUMPTION.FOR BALLASTING,DEBALLASTING,BALLAST EXCHANGE AND/OR CARGO HOLD CLEANING PURPOSED,VESSEL TO OPERATE TWO GENERATORS AND DAILY CONSUMPTION SHALL BE INCREASED ACCORDINGLY.WHEN TEMPERATURE IS OVER 32 DEGREE CELSIUS FOR MORE THAN 6 HOURS IN ANY NOON REPORT PERIOD A SPEED LOSS OF 0.5 KNOTS IS EXPECTED IF SAILING AND AN ADDITIONAL FUEL CONSUMPTION OF 1.5MT IFO PER DAY IS EXPECTED IF IN PORT DUE TO EXTREME SEAWATER COOLING SYSTEM DEMANDS.WHEN TEMPERATURE IS LOWER THAN 20 DEGREE CESIUS FOR MORE THAN 6 HOURS,THE VSL CONSUME FOR BOILER ADDITIONAL 1.5 MT IFO/MGO PER DAY. WHEN TEMPERATURE IS 10 DEGREE CESIUS OR LOWER,THE VSL CONSUME FOR BOILER ADDITIONAL 2.5MT IFO/MGO PER DAY.THE VSL SHALL HAVE THE LIVERTY TO USD LSMGO FOR MANEUVERING ON DEPARTURE/ARRIVAL,STARTING OF A/E NAVIGATING IN SHALLOW/RESTRICTED/BUSY WATERS CANALS,AND RIVERS.PERIODS OF LESS THAN 24HOURS,FROM NOON REPORT TO NOON REPORT,OF CONTINUOUS GOOD WEATHER TO BE EXPRESSLY EXCLUDED FROM DETERMINATION OF THE VSL’S PERFORMANCE.UNLESS OTHERWISE AGREED BY OWNERS,CHARTERERS MAY NOT DEDUCT OR SET-OFF AMOUNTS FROM HIRE PAYMENTS FOR SPEED AND/OR OVERCONSUMPTION CLAIMS.EXTRAPOLATION OF “GOOD WEATHER ” PERFORMANCE FOR “BAD WEATHER” IS NOT ALLOWED.WHEN ENTERING ECA,CHARTERERS TO ARRANGE TIMELY SUPPLY OF APPROPRIATE AND SUFFICIENT IFO AND GO TO ENTER AND EXIT ECA WITH 4 DAYS MARGIN(FOR CHANGEOVER AND UNPUMPABLES).BEFORE FIXING FOR ECA,CHARTERERS TO ENSURE SUFFICIENT SEPARATE EMPTY IFO/MGO TANKS ARE AVAIABLE.ULTRA-LOWSULPHUR FUEL OILS ARE NOT ACCEPTABLE.ONLY GO NOT CONTAINING FAME(FATTY ACID METHYLESTER)-BIODIESEL-TO BE SUPPLIED AS ECA FUEL.VSL MAY USD LSMGO IN M/E WHEN MANEUVERING/NAVIGATING IN CONFINED WATERS/RIVERS ESTUARIES/CANALS/IN OUT OF PORTS/ENGINE STARTING AND STOPPING/OPERATING UNDER LOW LOAD.ETC
ABOVE DESCRIPTION ALL ABOUT
